question: What two capabilities does the Etherean 'Soul-Compass' provide to spirit guides?

answers.original: The Etherean Soul-Compass allows spirit guides to detect Life-Auras and navigate Astral-Currents.

ops.description: Memory-Welding requires intense concentration and focus, a skill possessed by Mind-Smiths.

Verdant is the third planet in the Lumina System, located within the habitable zone.<SEP>Verdant is the third planet in the Lumina System, located within the habitable zone and known for its widespread flora.
The Celestian Film Industry holds awards ceremonies that are broadcast across star systems.
The prophecy spoke of a chosen Zoodle.

entities.name: Etherean Soul-Compass
entities.description: The Etherean Soul-Compass is a device used by spirit guides to detect Life-Auras and navigate Astral-Currents.

entities.name: Spirit Guide
entities.description: Spirit guides are individuals who use the Soul-Compass to detect Life-Auras and navigate Astral-Currents.

entities.name: Astral-Current
entities.description: Astral-Currents are invisible rivers between worlds that allow travel between dimensional planes.

relations.description: Spirit guides use the Etherean Soul-Compass to detect Life-Auras.
The Etherean Soul-Compass detects Life-Auras around living creatures.
The Temple of Eternal Light houses the first Soul-Compass.
Spirit guides serve as bridges between the Spirit-Realm and the physical world.
The Etherean Soul-Compass allows navigation through Astral-Currents.
Spirit guides navigate through Astral-Currents using the Soul-Compass.
Etherean music is used by spirit guides to heal troubled souls.

entities.name: Floating Islands of Aeridia
entities.description: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are natural landmasses that drift high above the world's surface in the upper atmosphere.<SEP>The Floating Islands of Aeridia are natural wonders on planet Ntulu, drifting high above the world's surface in the upper atmosphere.

entities.name: Millennia
entities.description: Light-Forging techniques have been refined over millennia.

entities.name: Verdant Healers
entities.description: Verdant healers are renowned throughout many realms for their healing abilities.

entities.name: Ocean Streams
entities.description: Current-Crystals channel the power of ocean streams.
